mdSummary:
# Marquee

Infinitely scrolling horizontal band of children.

**Package:** `Lumeo.Motion` · **Category:** Motion
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/marquee

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Marquee | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Content to scroll. Rendered twice (a live copy plus an aria-hidden/inert duplicate track) to create a seamless looping effect via CSS animation. |
| Marquee | Speed | `MarqueeSpeed` | `MarqueeSpeed.Normal` | Scroll speed, mapped to an animation duration: Slow (60s), Normal (30s, default), or Fast (12s). |
| Marquee | Direction | `MarqueeDirection` | `MarqueeDirection.Left` | Horizontal scroll direction (Left or Right). Inverted by Reverse. |
| Marquee | PauseOnHover | `bool` | `false` | Pauses the scroll animation while the pointer hovers the marquee. |
| Marquee | Reverse | `bool` | `false` | Flips Direction (Left becomes Right and vice versa). |
| Marquee | Vertical | `bool` | `false` | Scrolls vertically instead of horizontally. |
| Marquee | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the outer wrapper. |
| Marquee | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the outer wrapper. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Marquee) — Content to scroll. Rendered twice (a live copy plus an aria-hidden/inert duplicate track) to create a seamless looping effect via CSS animation.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Marquee />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/Marquee/Marquee.razor`
